3216650.name: TMNT: Shredder's Revenge - Radical Remixes (Original Game Soundtrack)
3216650.description:
TMNT: Shredder’s Revenge - Radical Remixes is a brand new take on the critically-acclaimed OST of the new reference for side-scrolling Beat’em ups.
Inspired by the music of one of the most iconic pop culture licenses of all time, the TMNT: Shredder’s Revenge OST composed by Tee Lopes, was totally remixed in the spirit and aesthetics of a NES soundtrack. Sean Bialo (Penny’s Big Breakaway, Mighty Morphin Power Rangers: Rita's Rewind, Double Dragon Gaiden) supervised the whole sound identity and remixed most of the tracks. Several guests were invited to add their own touch:
  • Anamanaguchi, the legendary chiptune-based pop & rock band from NYC behind Scott Pilgrim vs. the World OST, remixed the banger “Panic In The Sky!”
  • Jake Kaufman, the composer of some great chiptune VGM OSTs such as Shovel Knight remixed “It Won't Fly!”
  • Button Masher, Grammy Award Winning Video Game Music Artist and frontman of the current chiptune scene took over “Rumble In The Zoo”
  • Keiji Yamagishi, one of the Ninja Gaiden series 80’s composers and considered as a pioneer of chiptune music, produced the 8-bit version of “The Lost Archenemies”
  • Tomoya Tomita, member of Konami’s sound team in the 90’s and part of Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III: The Manhattan Project remixed “A Few Screws Loose”
